_meta.note: Hand-curated per-token prices for models NO upstream catalog (LiteLLM / OpenRouter) carries: Xiaomi MiMo, StepFun, and not-yet-listed DeepSeek V4 tiers. seed.go merges this with the auto-generated seed.json; entries here override auto on key conflict. tools/dump_pricing_snapshot only regenerates seed.json, so this file survives regen. Add glm-* here ONLY if you accept losing auto-refresh for them (they are normally fetched live from OpenRouter).
